mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.collection_start_time >= CURDATE() AND c.collection_start_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayCollect, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.ai_analysis_status IN (0, 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingAnalyse, ( SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(1), 0) FROM ecg_diagnosis_report r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.report_status = 1 ) AS pendingAudit, ( SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(1), 0) FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 ) AS alertCount FROM ecg_collection_record c WHERE c.is_deleted = 0

SELECT m.patient_id AS patientId, m.patient_name AS patientName, CONCAT(COALESCE(m.dept_name, '未知病区'), ' | ', COALESCE(m.bed_no, '--')) AS wardBed, m.current_heart_rate AS heartRate, CASE m.monitor_status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '预警' ELSE '正常' END AS status, DATE_FORMAT(m.latest_update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updateTime FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.is_key_monitor = 1 AND m.monitor_status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY CASE m.monitor_status WHEN 2 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, m.latest_update_time DESC, m.monitor_id DESC
SELECT COALESCE(m.dept_name, '未知病区') AS deptName, COUNT(1) AS patientCount FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY m.dept_name ORDER BY patientCount DESC, deptName ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.patient_id = #{patientId} AND m.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE ecg_real_time_monitor SET is_key_monitor = #{isKeyMonitor}, update_time = NOW() WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.collection_start_time >= CURDATE() AND c.collection_start_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayCollect, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN c.ai_analysis_status IN (0, 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingAnalyse, ( SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(1), 0) FROM ecg_diagnosis_report r WHERE r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.report_status = 1 ) AS pendingAudit, ( SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(1), 0) FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0 ) AS alertTotal FROM ecg_collection_record c WHERE c.is_deleted = 0

SELECT m.patient_id AS patientId, m.patient_name AS patientName, CONCAT(COALESCE(m.dept_name, '未知病区'), ' | ', COALESCE(m.bed_no, '--')) AS wardBed, m.current_heart_rate AS heartRate, CASE m.monitor_status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '预警' WHEN 3 THEN '离线' ELSE '未知' END AS monitorStatus, DATE_FORMAT(m.latest_update_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS updateTime FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE m.monitor_status WHEN 2 THEN 1 WHEN 3 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, m.latest_update_time DESC, m.monitor_id DESC
SELECT COALESCE(m.dept_name, '未知病区') AS wardName, COUNT(1) AS patientCount FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY m.dept_name ORDER BY patientCount DESC, wardName ASC
SELECT s.stat_value4 FROM ecg_statistics_result s WHERE s.stat_type = 4 ORDER BY s.stat_date DESC, s.stat_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.patient_id AS patientId, m.patient_name AS patientName, p.inpatient_no AS inpatientNo, COALESCE(w.ward_name, m.dept_name) AS wardName, COALESCE(m.bed_no, b.bed_no) AS bedNo, CONCAT(COALESCE(w.ward_name, m.dept_name, '未知病区'), ' | ', COALESCE(m.bed_no, b.bed_no, '--')) AS wardBed, p.primary_diagnosis AS primaryDiagnosis, m.current_heart_rate AS currentHeartRate, m.monitor_status AS monitorStatus, CASE m.monitor_status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '预警' WHEN 3 THEN '离线' ELSE '未知' END AS monitorStatusText, m.warning_level AS warningLevel, CASE m.warning_level WHEN 0 THEN '正常' WHEN 1 THEN '低危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS warningLevelText, m.latest_update_time AS updateTime FROM ecg_real_time_monitor m LEFT JOIN patient_info p ON m.patient_id = p.patient_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_ward w ON p.ward_id = w.ward_id AND w.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_bed b ON p.bed_id = b.bed_id AND b.is_deleted = 0 WHERE m.patient_id = #{patientId} AND m.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.collection_end_time AS trendTime, COALESCE(a.heart_rate, m.current_heart_rate) AS heartRate, COALESCE(a.abnormal_level, 0) AS abnormalLevel, CASE COALESCE(a.abnormal_level, 0) WHEN 0 THEN '正常' WHEN 1 THEN '低危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS abnormalLevelText FROM ecg_collection_record c LEFT JOIN ecg_ai_diagnosis a ON c.record_id = a.record_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ecg_real_time_monitor m ON c.patient_id = m.patient_id AND m.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.patient_id = #{patientId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.collection_end_time DESC, c.record_id DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT w.warning_id AS alertId, w.warning_time AS warningTime, w.warning_type AS warningType, w.warning_level AS alertLevel, CASE w.warning_level WHEN 1 THEN '低危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS alertLevelText, w.handle_status AS alertStatus, CASE w.handle_status WHEN 0 THEN '待确认' WHEN 1 THEN '待处理' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' WHEN 3 THEN '已处理' WHEN 4 THEN '已忽略' ELSE '未知' END AS alertStatusText, w.handle_time AS handleTime, w.handle_user_name AS handleUserName, w.handle_opinion AS handleRemark FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w WHERE w.patient_id = #{patientId} AND w.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY w.warning_time DESC, w.warning_id DESC

SELECT c.record_id AS recordId, c.ecg_no AS ecgNo, c.collection_start_time AS collectionStartTime, c.collection_end_time AS collectionEndTime, c.device_name AS deviceName, c.ai_analysis_status AS aiAnalysisStatus, CASE c.ai_analysis_status WHEN 0 THEN '待分析' WHEN 1 THEN '分析中' WHEN 2 THEN '已分析' WHEN 3 THEN '失败' ELSE '未知' END AS aiAnalysisStatusText, c.report_status AS reportStatus, CASE c.report_status WHEN 0 THEN '未生成' WHEN 1 THEN '待审核' WHEN 2 THEN '已审核' WHEN 3 THEN '驳回' ELSE '未知' END AS reportStatusText, c.display_status AS displayStatus, CASE c.display_status WHEN 0 THEN '待分析' WHEN 1 THEN '已分析' WHEN 2 THEN '已审核' WHEN 3 THEN '已驳回' WHEN 4 THEN '采集失败' ELSE '未知' END AS displayStatusText, c.ai_conclusion_short AS aiConclusionShort FROM ecg_collection_record c WHERE c.patient_id = #{patientId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.collection_start_time DESC, c.record_id DESC LIMIT 30
